scripts.enable:model-6b: SERVICE_URL=$(gcloud run services describe rollmind-endpoint-manager --platform managed --region us-east4 --format='value(status.url)') && curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $(gcloud auth print-identity-token)" "$SERVICE_URL/toggle?action=on&name=rollmind-gemma-7b&model_name=rollmind-gemma-7b"
scripts.disable:model: SERVICE_URL=$(gcloud run services describe rollmind-endpoint-manager --platform managed --region us-east4 --format='value(status.url)') && curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $(gcloud auth print-identity-token)" "$SERVICE_URL/toggle?action=off&name=rollmind-gemma-7b&model_name=rollmind-gemma-7b"
